name: Nova Agency Concierge
description: Skills exposed by Nova Agency's website concierge agent. Backed by Llama 3.1 8B via Cloudflare Workers AI with a grounded knowledge base of Nova's tier prices, services, and contact details.

skills.name: quote_tier
skills.description: Recommends and quotes one of Nova's 5 monthly tiers (Launch / Spark / Foundation / Growth / Scale, AED 1,200–32,000/mo) based on the visitor's described needs.

skills.name: quote_service
skills.description: Cites the exact AED price and short description for any of Nova's 48 individual services from the grounded knowledge base.

skills.name: explain_offering
skills.description: Explains what Nova is, how it's structured across its 6 service categories, and what makes it different from generic marketing agencies.

skills.name: handoff_human
skills.description: Hands the visitor off to the Nova founders via WhatsApp or the contact page when the request is outside the knowledge base or the visitor wants to start.
